home.intro: A bilingual lab website in go-live rehearsal, with static deployment, content validation, and a news-only CMS pilot in place.

highlights.title: Research
highlights.desc: Embodied AI / HCI / Robotics, pending replacement with confirmed research tracks and member profiles before public launch.

highlights.title: Recent Outputs
highlights.desc: Papers, projects, and news are covered by validation, while news can enter PR review through the CMS workflow.

highlights.title: Recruitment & Collaboration
highlights.desc: Recruitment directions, collaboration modes, and contact channels remain bilingual and require confirmed contacts before launch.
